extra.message: User-controlled 'username' query parameter is concatenated directly into a Jinja2 template string via from_string(). An attacker can inject Jinja2 template expressions (e.g., {{ 7*7 }}, {{ config }}, or RCE payloads) which will be evaluated server-side, allowing arbitrary code execution.

cwe: CWE-1336: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Template Engine
